content.text: {"claims":[{"id":"claim-01","text":"30 minutes of moderate exercise 5 days a week reduces heart disease risk by 35%","context":"The host cites a 2023 WHO study showing regular moderate exercise dramatically cuts cardiovascular risk.","importance":5},{"id":"claim-02","text":"Resistance training lowers LDL cholesterol by an average of 10%","context":"Citing a meta-analysis of 40 studies, the video claims weight training improves cholesterol profiles.","importance":3}]}
